title: Offer Evaluation, Compensation, Negotiation, and Decision Quality · Career Evidence Case: Total Package
summary: A verbal offer creates urgency while base pay, equity, benefits, schedule, location, probation, intellectual property, contingencies, and role expectations remain unclear. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the total package increment in evidence-based offer decision model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints.
Request and verify a written offer, role, level, reporting line, location, schedule, start, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and decision date.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,

decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]

options.text: Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
The highest base salary is always the best economic offer. That claim fails the predict total package evidence boundary for Total Package.

For predict total package, apply Total Package without its stated preconditions, omit the evidence-based offer decision model trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Total Package for evidence-based offer decision model.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints. A defensible solution applies Total Package, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-based offer decision model.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-total-package — Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
focus: career-total-package
decision-evidence: Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: The highest base salary is always the best economic offer. This fails the Total Package contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
